message:
feat: enrich approval and MCP audit entries with structured DecisionContext

Migrate approval-grant and MCP tool-call audit entries from ad-hoc
JSON blobs to the typed DecisionContext schema, matching the approach
already used for policy evaluation audits (see 05cf9845). This gives
every audit row a consistent, queryable structure with explicit rule
traces, evidence entries, and determining-rule pointers.

approval.rs:
- Add build_approval_grant_decision_context() that constructs a
  DecisionContext when an allow_once approval code is consumed,
  recording the approval stage, workspace, actor, surface, action
  kind, pane ID, and domain as structured evidence entries
- Fall back to constructing a fresh DecisionContext when the caller
  does not supply one via ApprovalAuditContext
- Add parse_decision_context() and evidence() test helpers for
  verifying serialized DecisionContext fields in tests

mcp_helpers.rs:
- Add mcp_audit_decision_context() that builds a DecisionContext for
  every MCP tool-call audit entry, capturing tool name, action kind,
  surface (Mcp), policy decision, result, elapsed_ms, and optional
  error codes as structured evidence
- Wire mcp_audit_decision_context into record_mcp_audit() so every
  persisted AuditActionRecord now carries a decision_context field
- Add comprehensive tests: unit test for surface/error-code tracking,
  integration test that persists an audit row and verifies the full
  DecisionContext round-trips through storage

main.rs:
- Rename approval_target_action_kind → audit_target_action_kind for
  clarity since it is now used in plan audit contexts too
- Add plan_audit_surface() to derive PolicySurface from ActionKind
  (SendText→Mux, WorkflowRun→Workflow, default→Human)
- Rewrite build_plan_audit_context() from a serde_json::json! blob to
  a proper DecisionContext with rule traces, determining rule, and
  structured evidence entries (stage, plan_stage, plan_action_kind,
  plan_surface, correlation_id, plan_id, plan_hash, plan_pane_id)
- Update all call sites in run() to pass timestamp_ms and accept
  Option<String> instead of String for decision_context

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
